Your opt-out preference signal is honored

Notice of the right to opt-out of sharing personal information for targeted advertising

If you don’t want us to share personal information for targeted advertising purposes, you can opt out of sharing data collected through cookies on wellsfargo.com by turning off the sharing data for targeted advertising option. For more information on cookies and how to manage your preferences for all Wells Fargo websites, see our
Digital Privacy & Cookies Policy.

Manage preferences

Strictly Necessary, Functional and Performance & Analytical

Always Active

  • Strictly Necessary
    Always Active

    These cookies are necessary for our site to function or to enable functionality requested by you. They’re needed to do things like signing on to our site, applying for a product or service, or honoring a language preference. You can set your browser to block all cookies, but some parts of our site won't work without them.

  • Performance & Analytical
    Always Active

    These cookies allow us to monitor the performance of our websites, such as how many people are visiting our site and how they got there, so we can measure and improve your experience on our site. If these are blocked, we have less information available to us to continue to improve our site.

  • Functional
    Always Active

    These cookies enable an enhanced experience. They may be set by us or third-party providers whose services we have available on our site. This may include things like playing videos on our site, downloading PDF forms or seeing content personalized to you. If these cookies are blocked, then some of these services may not function.

Sharing data for targeted advertising

You may exercise your right to opt out of the sale or sharing of personal information by turning off this option above. If you opt out, we won’t show you advertisements based on your browsing behavior and will not share your personal information with third parties for targeted advertising.

  • Marketing & Advertising
    label

    These cookies may be set by us or through our advertising partners. This information is used to understand your use of our site so we may show you more relevant online content and advertising. If you block or turn them off, you may still see ads, but they won’t be targeted to you based on your browsing behavior.
